products.title: Aura Sports Bra - Black
products.body_html:
Super soft, super cute, minimal coverage to show off your upper body

  • Cute, comfy
  • Flattering halter neck shape
  • Sliders in the back to get the right fit & lift
  • Super soft fabric
  • Minimal coverage shows off your upper body
